ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event or abstract of the presentation */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract providing more detail about the event */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the event (reference to event_types) */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sponsor or organizing body */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location where the event is held (reference to locations) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees for the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Date by which attendees must register */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* Link to the event's web page for more information */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the event is published and visible to the public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website for the sponsoring organization */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sponsor */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* URLs to the sponsor's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of event */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Lecture, Talk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Average duration of events of this type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Average capacity of events of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., conference hall, university) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is found */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the attendee is affiliated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the attendee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the attendee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the attendee */,
  "profile_photo" TEXT /* URL to the attendee's profile photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being registered for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee who registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the registration was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Confirmed, Pending, Cancelled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the registration (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_agendas" (
  "agenda_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agenda item */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event to which the agenda belongs */,
  "session_title" TEXT /* Title of the session within the event */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Name of the speaker for the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number or name where the session takes place */,
  "track" TEXT /* Track or theme of the session */,
  "session_url" TEXT /* Link to the session's web page for more information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agenda_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_agendas_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being evaluated */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing the evaluation */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the attendee (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the attendee regarding the event */,
  "recommendation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the attendee would recommend the event */,
  "follow_up" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the attendee is interested in future events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event to which the session belongs */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the session covers */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number or name where the session takes place */,
  "track" TEXT /* Track or theme of the session */,
  "session_url" TEXT /* Link to the session's web page for more information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
